text.title: Browser Automation Overview Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team starts on Puppeteer in Python via pyppeteer; hits unmaintained-library bugs.
200 LOC of Puppeteer for a single static JSON fetch.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used the hammer they knew.

antipattern.symptom: Project picks Puppeteer; later requires multi-browser testing.
